reviews.comment:
Esmerada atención del personal de cafetería, podrían mejorar el lugar.
Baños en mal estado, cestos desbordados de papeles y falta del mismo en los dispenser

(Translated by Google)
The cafeteria staff provided excellent service, but the place could be improved.
The restrooms were in poor condition, the wastebaskets were overflowing with paper, and the dispensers were empty.
